MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Thomas J. Losavio, Esq. represented Plaintiff John Serrato and Defendant Steve Kang appeared in pro per. The case did not and trial date is confirmed.
